Cover with plastic wrap; refrigerate until ready to use.", "Cover a plate or platter with paper towels. ["Place vegetable stock, onion, soy sauce, garlic, cinnamon sticks, ground ginger, star anise, and bay leaves in a large pot; bring to a boil.
